full_text:
Jia Xin 賈信
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jia Xin (賈信). Left to guard Liyang while Cao Cao went to fight Liu Biao. Defeated two rebels. Jia Xin was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
